title: Star Wars: Darth Bane Trilogy
content:
{{Top|rwm|old|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Bane}} {{BookSeries |image=[[File:BaneTrilogyLogo.png]] |title=''Star Wars: Darth Bane Trilogy'' |author=[[Drew Karpyshyn]] |cover artist=*[[John Jude Palencar]] *[[John Van Fleet]] |illustrator= |editor=*[[Shelly Shapiro]] *[[Sue Rostoni]] |publisher=[[Del Rey]] |first date=[[September 26]], [[2006]]{{SWArchive|url=eu/lit/novel/f20060926/index.html|text=Drew Karpyshyn: Blazing the ''Path of Destruction''}} |last date=[[December 8]], [[2009]]{{SWArchive|url=vault/books/news20090219.html|text=Book Update: ''Deathtroopers'' and Darth Bane}} |media type=Hardcover |timeline=[[1006 BBY]]—[[980 BBY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |num books=3 |preceded by= |followed by= }} The '''''Star Wars: Darth Bane Trilogy''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] novel trilogy from author [[Drew Karpyshyn]] and publisher [[Del Rey]] focusing on the life of the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]]. The stories include ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' ([[2006]]), ''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]'' ([[2007]]), and ''[[Darth Bane: Dynasty of Evil]]'' ([[2009]]). ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Darth Bane Trilogy}} ===Cover gallery=== File:BaneTrilogyLogo.png|Cover File:Path-of-destruction.jpg|''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' File:RuleofTwo.jpg|''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]'' File:Dynasty_of_Evil.jpg|''[[Darth Bane: Dynasty of Evil]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=series/BNE/star-wars-darth-bane-trilogy---legends|text=Star Wars: Darth Bane Trilogy – Legends Series}} {{Trilogy-box |title=''[[Star Wars: Darth Bane Trilogy]]'' |part1=[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction|Path of Destruction]]''
